sections.label: Verse 1
lines: An le leng tui gam ka tung zo,
A phatna teng kei aa hi zo;
Keima khuamial leng mang zo hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw gam nuampi, a pha gam
Mualsang tung pan ka gal-et a,
Kei a’ ding bawl kholhsa inn pi,
A tangpha hi tuipi gal ah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nuam takin kei tawh hong om khawm;
A khut in dam tak in hong
Vantung gamgi ciang dong ka nai.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A vul ngei lo pakte palh in,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Vantung gam pan ngaih mah mah la,
Huih in hong puak ka gal zak hi;
Tatna phelna la sa uh hi.
